name: Autograding
on: [push]
jobs:
  run-tests:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout alumno
        uses: actions/checkout@v3

      - name: Configurar Java
        uses: actions/setup-java@v3
        with:
          java-version: '17'
          distribution: 'temurin'

      - name: Compilar
        run: javac -d out src/core/*.java src/solution/*.java

      - name: Descargar Tests Privados
        env:
          TOKEN: ${{ secrets.MY_PRIVATE_TOKEN }}
        run: |
          # Clonamos el repo privado en una carpeta temporal llamada 'secretos'
          git clone https://x-access-token:$TOKEN@github.com/TU_ORGANIZACION/bin-packing-private-tests.git secretos
          
      - name: Ejecutar Evaluador
        run: |
          # Ejecutamos el Main pasando la ruta donde están los .txt privados
          java -cp out core.Main secretos/data/private
